_note: GENUINE news-derived seeds for the 2024 US ELECTION gem — real events, real URLs. ONE catalyst (Trump's Nov-5-2024 win) with TWO distinct theses, each seeded so BOTH tickers get named: (1) GEO Group — mass-deportation / ICE-detention buildout (GEO jumped ~42% the session after the win; ICE contracts are ~43% of revenue; up ~105% by Feb-2025). (2) MicroStrategy (MSTR) — the 'crypto president' Bitcoin rally (MSTR +50%+ since Nov-5, outpacing BTC's +30%; +477% in 2024; bought 51,780 BTC Nov 11-17). Catalysts kept DISTINCT (immigration vs crypto) so the matcher holds them as two separate events/agents — the concurrency test. Replaces the prior synthetic (blank-url) seeds. Under-owned framing dialed per the RNMBY/MP/BWET method. Look-ahead caveat: curator training postdates these dates (upper bound). Non-blank url = news-derived.

articles.title: Trump's win sends private-prison stocks soaring; GEO Group the purest ICE-detention play, still under-owned
articles.snippet: Shares of private-prison operators soared after Donald Trump's election win on expectations of a hard immigration crackdown and mass deportations. GEO Group jumped about 42% in a single session and CoreCivic 29%. ICE contracts already account for roughly 43% of GEO's revenue, and it is the largest private operator of ICE detention capacity - positioned to win the detention-bed buildout a mass-deportation surge requires. Still under-owned as the enforcement ramp is only beginning.

articles.title: Trump names Tom Homan 'border czar'; GEO Group climbs again as deportation machinery takes shape
articles.snippet: Private-prison stocks rose again after President-elect Trump named Tom Homan - who ran immigration enforcement in his first term - as his 'border czar,' signaling the deportation apparatus is being staffed immediately. GEO Group, the largest private ICE-detention contractor, is the most direct beneficiary of the coming detention-capacity expansion; the enforcement buildout is only just starting and the vehicle remains under-owned relative to the contracted bed pipeline.

articles.title: Trump's 'crypto president' win ignites Bitcoin; MicroStrategy the leveraged proxy, still early
articles.snippet: Bitcoin surged to records after Trump's win on his pledge to be a 'crypto president' - easing regulation, protecting crypto firms, and standing up a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. MicroStrategy (MSTR), which holds Bitcoin as its primary treasury asset and trades as a leveraged proxy, jumped more than 50% since Nov 5, outpacing Bitcoin's 30% move. Still early as the crypto-friendly policy agenda is only being formed and the reserve is not yet enacted.

articles.title: MicroStrategy buys 51,780 more Bitcoin as the Trump crypto rally powers higher
articles.snippet: MicroStrategy disclosed in an SEC filing that it acquired 51,780 bitcoin between Nov 11 and Nov 17 at an average price of about $88,627, lifting its holdings to 331,200 BTC - over 1.5% of all bitcoin. The buying, funded by convertible debt and stock, is powered by the post-election crypto rally; MSTR is up about 477% in 2024. The leveraged-treasury thesis is a momentum play with no discrete resolution - it de-rates only when Bitcoin itself rolls over.
